failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out before returning evidence, so the agent could not determine the cheapest available Skateboard.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's plan and intent matched the user goal: search the product catalog for available Skateboards sorted by ascending price. The concrete tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the expected ProductCatalogSearch arguments. The failure was an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a schema error, access block, misunderstanding, or hallucination.
